prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ONLY_DWT_catboost', seasonality_champion='THETA', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: The validation analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.95) and high seasonality variance (0.80), with THETA dominating overall RMSE while ONLY_DWT_catboost excels at trend tracking. Early horizons favor THETA/ETS while late horizons prefer FT_svr, indicating complementary strengths across forecast steps that justify DBA combination to leverage diverse pattern-capturing capabilities rather than relying on a single model.

Early horizons favor THETA/ETS while late horizons prefer FT_svr, indicating complementary strengths across forecast steps that justify DBA combination to leverage diverse pattern-capturing capabilities rather than relying on a single model."

raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["best_per_horizon_by_validation", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k3", "inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25", "dba_combination"],
  "params_overrides": {"topk_mean_per_horizon_k3": {"top_k": 3}, "inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.25": {"top_k": 3, "shrinkage": 0.25}},
  "score_preset": "rmse_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity favoring selection methods. RMSE spread between THETA (771.53) and ONLY_FT_catboost (1517.07) is ~97% justifying top-k averaging with shrinkage. pattern_analyst_insights recommends dba_combination for high seasonality variance (0.80). With only 3 windows, small top_k=3 prevents overfitting while inverse_rmse_weights_sh0.25 adds robustness against outliers."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: The validation analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.95) and high seasonality variance (0.80), with THETA dominating overall RMSE while ONLY_DWT_catboost excels at trend tracking. Early horizons favor THETA/ETS while late horizons prefer FT_svr, indicating complementary strengths across forecast steps that justify DBA combination to leverage diverse pattern-capturing capabilities rather than relying on a single model.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong per-horizon model diversity favoring selection methods. RMSE spread between THETA (771.53) and ONLY_FT_catboost (1517.07) is ~97% justifying top-k averaging with shrinkage. pattern_analyst_insights recommends dba_combination for high seasonality variance (0.80). With only 3 windows, small top_k=3 prevents overfitting while inverse_rmse_weights_sh0.25 adds robustness against outliers.
